meta.title: MHA Jobs — Professional recruitment by MHA Consultancy

hero.headline: Professional recruitment, built on clarity and human judgement.
hero.subheadline: MHA Jobs connects candidates and employers through transparent opportunities, explainable job fit, and consultants who step in when it matters.

candidate.lead: Search professional opportunities, understand your fit, track every application, and reach MHA career support when you need it.

highlight.title: Understand your fit before you apply
highlight.body: Explainable Job Fit shows matched factors and honest gaps — sourced from MHA, never a black box.

employer.lead: Plan and publish vacancies, review applicants efficiently, follow recruitment progress, and call on MHA hiring expertise.

highlight.title: Recruitment intelligence you can trust
highlight.body: Hiring insight and platform analytics, each clearly sourced — with MHA consultants when judgement matters.

tracking.title: Transparent application tracking
tracking.body: Always know your current stage, what it means, and the next step.

fit.title: Explainable Job Fit
fit.body: A rule-based fit score with matched factors and honest gaps — never a black box.

opportunities.title: Professional opportunities
opportunities.body: Roles from approved employers, presented clearly without clutter.

guidance.title: MHA guidance
guidance.body: Reach a consultant for resume help and career direction when judgement matters.

publishing.title: Structured job publishing
publishing.body: Create, preview, and publish vacancies with consistent, complete details.

review.title: Efficient applicant review
review.body: Table, Kanban, and split-screen review with resumes and answers in one place.

pipeline.title: Pipeline visibility
pipeline.body: Track candidates through every stage with reliable recruitment insight.

expertise.title: MHA recruitment expertise
expertise.body: Bring in consultants for difficult roles and hiring decisions.

console.title: Credible intelligence, clearly sourced
console.lead: Every module states whether it is MHA insight, real platform analytics, or an illustrative preview. We never display invented activity.

rolesInFocus.title: Roles in focus
rolesInFocus.body: Role families MHA observes demand for across professional hiring.

hiringOutlook.title: Hiring outlook
hiringOutlook.body: A qualitative read on hiring conditions from MHA consultants.
hiringOutlook.recent: {count, plural, one {# new role published in the last 30 days} other {# new roles published in the last 30 days}}.

salaryGuidance.title: Salary guidance
salaryGuidance.body: Indicative ranges appear here only where MHA has a reliable source.
salaryGuidance.previewNote: Illustrative preview. We never display a salary range we cannot support.

skillsThemes.title: Skills in demand
skillsThemes.body: Themes drawn from approved insight content, not user data.

spotlight.title: MHA recruitment observation
spotlight.body: Curated hiring observations from MHA consultants appear here as they are published.

candidate.title: Your next step
candidate.body: Browse professional roles, then create a profile to track applications and see Job Fit.

employer.title: Your next step
employer.body: See how publishing and applicant review work, then register your organisation for MHA approval.

console.previewNote: Illustrative preview. Live aggregates appear once enough real platform data exists.

opportunities.title: Discover roles and the companies behind them
opportunities.jobsEmpty: Published roles will appear here once employers post them.
opportunities.companiesEmpty: Approved employer profiles will appear here.

journey.title: A clear path for both sides

expert.title: Technology for access, people for judgement
expert.lead: Self-service is the default. MHA consultants are available at the moments that need human judgement.

workspace.title: A modern, honest recruitment workspace
workspace.lead: Review applicants in a table, track them on a Kanban board, and assess candidates in split-screen — all in a calm, fast interface.
workspace.previewNote: Interface preview. No live candidate data is shown.

trust.title: How we keep the platform honest

operatedBy.title: Operated by MHA Consultancy
operatedBy.body: A recruitment platform run by a real consultancy, not an anonymous job board.

approval.title: Employer approval
approval.body: Every employer is reviewed and approved by MHA before they can publish.

privacy.title: Private, secure resumes
privacy.body: Resumes are private and only shared with employers you apply to.

fitLimits.title: Clear limits of Job Fit
fitLimits.body: Job Fit explains alignment; it never guarantees an interview or a hire.

humanSupport.title: Human support available
humanSupport.body: MHA consultants are reachable for candidates and employers alike.

responsibleData.title: Responsible data use
responsibleData.body: We show metrics only when they are reliable, and never invent activity.

finalCta.title: Two paths, one trusted platform
finalCta.candidateBody: Find professional roles and track your applications with clarity.
finalCta.employerBody: Publish vacancies and manage hiring with MHA support.
